title: YTP Tennis - In A Bold Move, TKOSF Sends A Spy To Robotnik's Base
description:
Round 4 vs. 7KAD

Last Round, 7KAD laid a beating on me with her incredible video effect talents. I knew trying to compete with them would be suicide, and so I played to my strengths in story-writing and sentence-mixing. The title explains the story. :P

The voice-over in the beginning is done by moi. 83

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
